g.text: 1) Customers should be able to query availability of items

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. User sends a request with location and filters to the Availability Service.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. Availability Service calls the Nearby Service to fetch serviceable DCs.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Nearby Service returns the list of nearby DC IDs.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Availability Service queries the Inventory DB for those DCs.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. It aggregates the available inventory and returns the response to the user.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2) Customers should be able to order items.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Singular transaction with isolation level SERIALIZABLE we can ensure that the entire transaction is atomic.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This means that if two users try to order the same item at the same time, one of them will be rejected.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - User sends a Place Order request to the Orders Service.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - A single Postgres transaction locks inventory, validates stock, creates the

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Order and OrderItems, and updates inventory.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - If any item is unavailable, the transaction rolls back.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: - On success, the transaction commits and the order is returned to the user.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: SERIALIZABLE is the highest isolation level in a database. It guarantees that concurrent transactions behave as if they were executed one after another,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: even if they actually run in parallel.
